entity.label: Shechaniah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The father of Shemaiah, who repaired the wall of Jerusalem (Neh. 3:29).

nodes.label: Shechaniah
nodes.description: The father of Shemaiah, who repaired the wall of Jerusalem (Neh. 3:29).

verses.text: And Shechaniah the son of Jehiel, one of the sons of Elam, answered and said unto Ezra, We have trespassed against our God, and have taken strange wives of the people of the land: yet now there is hope in Israel concerning this thing.
After them repaired Zadok the son of Immer over against his house. After him repaired also Shemaiah the son of Shechaniah, the keeper of the east gate.
